WarningAuditEvent.subtype[0]Invalid CodeThe Coding provided (http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/iso-21089-lifecycle#disclose) was not found in the value set 'Audit Event Sub-Type' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/audit-event-sub-type|4.0.1), and a code should come from this value set unless it has no suitable code (note that the validator cannot judge what is suitable).
